title.en: Check your claimable MultiversX eGold staking rewards balance
title.es: Check your claimable MultiversX eGold staking rewards balance
title.fr: Check your claimable MultiversX eGold staking rewards balance
title.ro: Check your claimable MultiversX eGold staking rewards balance
title.it: Check your claimable MultiversX eGold staking rewards balance

description.en: View and check your claimable MultiversX eGold (EGLD) staking rewards balance on MultiversX. See how much eGold you have available to claim from your staking delegations across all validators. Track your accumulated eGold rewards and claimable balance from multiple staking providers in one place.
description.de: Zeige deine beanspruchbaren MultiversX eGold (EGLD) Staking-Belohnungen an. Sieh, wie viel eGold du von deinen Staking-Delegationen über alle Validatoren hinweg beanspruchen kannst. Verfolge deine angesammelten eGold-Belohnungen und deinen beanspruchbaren Kontostand von mehreren Staking-Anbietern an einem Ort.

description.en: Your MultiversX wallet address to check claimable eGold staking rewards for.
description.de: Deine MultiversX-Wallet-Adresse, um beanspruchbare eGold-Staking-Belohnungen zu überprüfen.

output.REWARDS_ACCUMLATED: transform:() => out.reduce((acc, delegation) => acc + BigInt(delegation.claimableRewards), BigInt(0)).toString()
